name: Master Flank Steak Marinaded
recipeIngredient: 2 flank steaks (about 3.5 pounds), trimmed of fat
recipeInstructions:
1. Have your butcher butterfly the larger flank steak all the way through. You now have three pieces of flank steak.
2. The two thinner cuts will be used for the Flank Steak Roulade and the Beef and Citrus Salad.
3. Pour 1/4 cup barbecue sauce into the bottom of a glass or stainless-steel dish, tilting to cover the bottom.
4. Place one piece of steak in the dish, and continue to layer with 1/4 cup sauce and flank steak, ending with barbecue sauce.
5. Cover and refrigerate for 4 to 6 hours—no longer (the acid in the sauce will toughen the meat).
